name: SEABOARD CORP /DE/
summary: Seaboard Corporation is a diversified conglomerate operating in agricultural, energy, and ocean transport businesses. It engages in hog production, pork processing, and biodiesel/renewable diesel production in the U.S.; commodity trading and grain processing in Africa and South America; cargo shipping services in the Caribbean and Central and South America; electric power generation in the Dominican Republic; and holds a 52.5% equity investment in Butterball, LLC, a turkey products producer.
